Excellent location in the vicinity of reputed school, hospitals and malls

spec1.title: 1. Structure

textW.px: : RCC Framed structure designed for seismic compliant (Zone - 3)
: Floor height (incl. slab) : Will be maintained at 3000mm
: Anti–termite treatment will be done
: Finished with 2 coats of putty, 1 coat of primer and 2 coats of premium emulsion
: Exterior faces of the building finished with texture and 1 coat of primer and 2 coats of exterior Emulsion paint with color as per architect’s design
: RCC Framed structure designed for seismic compliant (Zone - 3)
: Floor height (incl. slab) : Will be maintained at 3000mm
: Anti–termite treatment will be done
: KOHLER/ American Standard OR equivalent
KOHLER/ American Standard OR equivalent
: Glass Shower partition
: Wall-mounted WC, with cistern, Health faucet, Single lever diverter,hand shower,Rain shower and counter mounted wash basin
: Floor-mounted WC, with cistern, Health faucet and Spout
: Teak wood frame and shutter with veneer panelling on both sides. : Ironmongeries like Digital lock system, tower bolts, door viewer, safety latch, Magnetic catcher.
: African teak wood frame and double side laminated door : Ironmongeries like tower bolt, and Magnetic catcher.
: African teak wood frame of double side laminated door : Ironmongeries like one side coin and thumb turn lock without key, tower bolt and door bush
: Aluminium / UPVC windows with sliding shutter with see-through plain glass and MS grill on the inner side (wherever applicable)
: Aluminium / UPVC windows and doors with toughened glass without grill
: 3 PHASE power supply connection
: Modular box & modular switches & sockets of Schneider or equivalent will be provided
: 100% Power Backup for all the Units

spec3.title: COMMON FEATURES:
spec3.p4: : Marble / Granite flooring As per Architect suggestion
spec3.p5: : Marble / Granite flooring As per Architect suggestion
spec3.p7: : MS handrail with enamel paint finish in all floors

spec3.title: OUTDOOR FEATURES:
spec3.p1: : UG Sump for Rain Water Storage. WTP Provision at Terrace and Treated water will be stored in OHT
spec3.p4: : CCTV surveillance cameras will be provided all-round the building at pivotal Locations in ground level
spec3.p5: : Walkway spaces well defined as per landscape design intent
spec3.p6: : Security booth will be provided at the entrance
spec3.p7: : Site perimeter fenced by compound wall with entry gates for a height of 1500mm as per design intent
spec3.p8: : Suitable landscape at appropriate places in the project as per design intent
spec3.p9: : Convex mirror for safe turning in driveway in / out
spec3.p10: : Interlocking paver block/equivalent flooring with a demarcated driveway
